requested_items.objective: Find the smallest MAC/cycle and vector-op/cycle point that keeps the 131k quality-backed KV8 frontier memory-bound.

expected_result.reason: If lower compute points remain HBM-bound with similar latency, schedule RTL/PPA for smaller compute arrays; if tile attention becomes dominant, keep compute near the transition point.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #628 and merge 44f66ebceec63b15b7412f0f0c63e5900a4f2142 at 2026-05-18T12:58:50Z.
